title: This MCP makes Hermes Agent 10x more powerful
summary: Apify MCP Connectors are specialized connectors that integrate with Hermes Agent to significantly increase its effectiveness. The connectors enable Hermes Agent to access web data and external APIs through Model Context Protocol integration.
writeup: The video demonstrates how Apify MCP Connectors integrate with the Hermes Agent to expand its capabilities. The connectors use Model Context Protocol to give Hermes Agent access to web data and external APIs. The takeaway: pairing a specialized MCP connector layer with an agent extends its reach beyond its base functionality and into live external sources.
